content: Free tile sources for MapLibre base maps: 1) OSM Standard raster tiles https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png - free but strict policy (no bulk download, no offline, must show attribution, valid User-Agent/Referer required). Fine for dev/low-traffic. 2) Carto basemaps (Positron/Dark Matter/Voyager) - commercial with free tier, registration required. 3) MapTiler - commercial with free non-commercial tier. 4) Stadia Maps - commercial with free tier, no registration for local dev. 5) MapLibre demo tiles https://demotiles.maplibre.org/style.json - vector tiles but minimal (only country boundaries, no streets). For dev/MVP: OSM raster tiles are simplest. For production: self-host or use commercial provider.
